nodes.label: AI as conversational research partner for complex topics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful when repeating itself
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly use AI for researching and understanding different topics

nodes.label: AI as debate partner for solution design
nodes.label_negative: AI as code generator that misses maintainability
nodes.grounding_span: I will think of a solution, ask AI how it would do it, compare solutions and debate about which one is the optimal one

nodes.label: AI as code reviewer and assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for generating entire classes
nodes.grounding_span: I'll then ask the AI to review the code

nodes.label: AI as tool for mundane task automation
nodes.label_negative: AI as not ready for big complex projects
nodes.grounding_span: it can help automate more mundane tasks

nodes.label: AI as learning and research tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited in deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: it's a great tool for learning and researching

nodes.label: AI as colleague and collaborator
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human skills

nodes.label: Preference for reading full text over AI summaries
nodes.label_negative: AI summarization as loss of nuance
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to read the text myself

nodes.label: Deep understanding and nuanced knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: You get more from reading the whole thing and understanding subtle details

nodes.label: Optimal and maintainable code quality
nodes.grounding_span: it might not be the most maintainable one

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it can help automate more mundane tasks

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I try to focus on the big picture

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI catching subtle bugs
nodes.grounding_span: AI identified really quickly and made me feel really amazed

nodes.label: Frustration with AI repeating unhelpful information
nodes.grounding_span: It kept saying the same stuff over and over

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI as colleague
nodes.grounding_span: Colleagues. We work together, since it's normal to accept change

nodes.label: Iterative probing and follow-up questioning
nodes.grounding_span: I usually ask follow up questions to dig deeper into the details

nodes.label: Strategic focus on high-level and interpersonal skills
nodes.grounding_span: I try to focus on the big picture - architectural structures, infrastructure, deployment, CI/CD
